title: Lobby Parkour
description: A simple and customizable plugin that adds Parkour to your Minecraft Server
body:
# Lobby Parkour

A simple and customizable plugin that adds Parkour to your Minecraft Server

## Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ixqN2ViTfB8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features
- Start, End and Checkpoints
- Leaderboards
- Customize each plate type
- Customize parkour messages
- Relocate Checkpoints
- Rename Parkour
- Place up to 26 parkours per server
